meta.title: Transaction Detail | Enterprise Admin - Quantum Shield
meta.description: View detailed transaction information including quantum signature verification and prover attestation.

tooltips.quantumProtected: This transaction is protected by quantum-resistant cryptography. Even if quantum computers become practical, the security of this transaction remains intact.
tooltips.dilithium: CRYSTALS-Dilithium is a NIST-approved lattice-based digital signature algorithm designed to be secure against quantum computer attacks.

tooltips.title: Prover nodes verify quantum-resistant signatures and generate STARK proofs. Their attestation confirms the validity of this transaction.
tooltips.proverId: Unique identifier for the Prover node that verified this transaction.
tooltips.attestationHash: Cryptographic hash proving that a Prover has verified this transaction.
tooltips.stakeAmount: Amount of tokens staked by the Prover as collateral. Larger stakes indicate higher reliability.
tooltips.verificationTime: Time taken for the Prover to verify the quantum signature and generate a STARK proof.

meta.title: Support Portal | Enterprise Admin - Quantum Shield
meta.description: Enterprise support portal. Access documentation, FAQ, and contact information.

hero.title: Enterprise Support
hero.description: Priority support with guaranteed response times for Enterprise customers.

apiKey.question: How do I rotate my API keys?
apiKey.answer: Navigate to API Keys section, click "Rotate" on the key you want to rotate. A new key will be generated and the old one will remain active for 24 hours.

emergency.question: What happens during an emergency unlock?
emergency.answer: Emergency unlocks bypass the normal 24-hour timelock but require a 7-day waiting period and incur a 5% penalty fee.

ipAllowlist.question: How do I add IP addresses to the allowlist?
ipAllowlist.answer: Go to Settings > Security, enable IP Allowlist, and add your IP addresses. Changes take effect immediately.

meta.title: Enterprise Terms of Service | Enterprise Admin - Quantum Shield
meta.description: Terms of service for Quantum Shield Enterprise

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: These Enterprise Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Quantum Shield Enterprise services ("Service") provided by Quantum Shield Inc. By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.content: The Service provides enterprise-grade asset protection solutions using quantum-resistant cryptography. This includes API access, management dashboard, reporting features, and priority support.

sla.title: 3. Service Level Agreement (SLA)
sla.content: We target 99.9% uptime for the Service. Unexpected downtime, excluding scheduled maintenance, will be addressed according to your SLA contract.

security.title: 4. Security Responsibilities
security.content: You are responsible for proper management of API keys, access permissions, and enabling two-factor authentication. We are responsible for platform-level security measures.

data.title: 5. Data Handling
data.content: Your transaction data, configuration, and audit logs are stored with appropriate security measures. Data retention and deletion follows our data retention policy.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Our liability is limited to contractual obligations. We are not liable for blockchain network failures, market fluctuations, or damages caused by your negligence.

termination.title: 7. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate this agreement with written notice. Payment obligations and confidentiality obligations survive termination.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may modify these Terms with 30 days notice. Significant changes will be communicated to your registered email address.

governing.title: 9. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. The Tokyo District Court has exclusive jurisdiction for any disputes.

contactInfo.title: Contact
contactInfo.content: For questions about these Terms, please contact enterprise@quantumshield.io.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Enterprise Admin - Quantum Shield
meta.description: Privacy policy for Quantum Shield Enterprise

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Quantum Shield Inc. respects your privacy and is committed to protecting personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle personal data in our Enterprise services.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect the following information necessary for service provision: organization information (name, address, contacts), user information (name, email, role), transaction data, access logs, and API usage history.

usage.title: 3. How We Use Information
usage.content: Collected information is used for service provision and improvement, security maintenance, customer support, legal compliance, and contract fulfillment.

sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell or rent personal information to third parties without your consent. We may share information when legally required or necessary for service provision (e.g., cloud providers) with appropriate safeguards.

security.title: 5. Security Measures
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, audit logging, and regular security assessments. Our quantum-resistant cryptography protects your data against future threats.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: Personal information is retained for as long as necessary for service provision or as legally required. After contract termination, data is deleted or anonymized within a reasonable period.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict processing, and request portability of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact enterprise@quantumshield.io.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve our services. These include essential cookies, analytics cookies, and functional cookies. You can manage these through your browser settings.

changes.title: 9. Policy Changes
changes.content: This policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated to your registered email address.

contactInfo.title: Contact
contactInfo.content: For privacy-related questions, please contact privacy@quantumshield.io or enterprise@quantumshield.io.

meta.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA) | Enterprise Admin - Quantum Shield
meta.description: Quantum Shield Enterprise SLA details

overview.title: SLA Overview
overview.description: Quantum Shield Enterprise provides the high availability and reliability your business requires.

availability.title: 1. Service Availability
availability.content: We target 99.9% or higher monthly service uptime. Scheduled maintenance time is excluded from uptime calculations. Maintenance is announced in advance and typically performed outside business hours.

support.title: 2. Support Response Times
support.content: Enterprise plans include 24/7 support. Critical incidents (service outages) receive initial response within 2 hours. Standard inquiries are answered within 1 business day.

credits.title: 3. Service Credits
credits.content: If monthly uptime falls below 99.9%, service credits are provided: 10% of monthly fee for 99.0-99.9%, 25% for 95.0-99.0%, and 50% for below 95.0%.

exclusions.title: 4. Exclusions
exclusions.content: The following are excluded from SLA coverage: scheduled maintenance, failures caused by customer misconfiguration, external factors (internet outages, blockchain network failures), and force majeure events.

reporting.title: 5. Incident Reporting
reporting.content: Please report service issues to our support team promptly. After receiving an incident report, we investigate and provide updates on scope and estimated recovery time.

monitoring.title: 6. Monitoring and Notifications
monitoring.content: We monitor services 24/7. During outages, status updates are posted on our status page and affected customers are notified.

contactInfo.title: Contact
contactInfo.content: For SLA-related questions, please contact enterprise@quantumshield.io.

meta.title: Enterprise License | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Quantum-resistant infrastructure, owned by you. On-premise deployment for complete control.

hero.title: Quantum-Resistant Infrastructure,
hero.description: Quantum Shield Enterprise provides quantum-resistant crypto infrastructure via code license. Run it on your infrastructure, offer services under your brand. Achieve regulatory compliance and complete data sovereignty.

whyQuantum.title: Why Quantum Resistance Matters Now
whyQuantum.subtitle: Quantum computers pose a threat to current cryptographic systems

threat.title: The Quantum Threat
threat.description: By the 2030s, quantum computers capable of breaking ECDSA signatures in minutes are expected to become practical. Prepare before the cryptographic foundation of digital assets is compromised.

harvest.title: Harvest Now, Decrypt Later
harvest.description: Attackers are collecting encrypted data today to decrypt with future quantum computers. Today's transaction data is at risk of future exposure.

regulation.title: Regulatory Landscape
regulation.description: NIST published PQC standards in 2024. Financial regulators worldwide are developing quantum-resistance transition roadmaps. Early adoption reduces regulatory risk.

whatIs.title: Complete Control with On-Premise Deployment
whatIs.subtitle: Own your quantum-resistant infrastructure with code license

points.title: Run on Your Infrastructure
points.description: All components run on your own infrastructure. Your data never leaves your environment.

points.title: White-Label Ready
points.description: Customize the admin dashboard with your branding. Offer services to end-users under your brand.

points.title: Continuous Maintenance Support
points.description: Security patches, bug fixes, and new features delivered continuously. Technical support included.

items.title: L3 Chain Node
items.description: Full node implementation for quantum-resistant L3 chain

items.title: Smart Contracts
items.description: Lock, unlock, and timelock contract suite

items.title: Prover Node
items.description: Prover node for STARK proof generation and verification

items.title: Observer Node
items.description: Observer node for fraud monitoring and slashing proposals

items.title: Admin Dashboard
items.description: Admin UI with user management, transaction monitoring, and reporting

items.title: API Gateway
items.description: REST API + Webhooks for external system integration

techSpecs.title: Technology Behind Quantum Resistance
techSpecs.subtitle: State-of-the-art post-quantum cryptographic algorithms approved by NIST

specs.title: Dilithium-III
specs.description: NIST-standard lattice-based signature algorithm. Quantum-resistant digital signatures.

specs.title: SPHINCS+
specs.description: Hash-based signature algorithm. Backup scheme based on different mathematical assumptions.

specs.title: 24-Hour Timelock
specs.description: All unlock requests require 24-hour waiting period. Provides response time in case of unauthorized access.

specs.title: Prover/Observer Verification
specs.description: Decentralized proof generation and fraud monitoring system. No single point of failure.

compliance.title: Optimized for Audits and Regulations
compliance.subtitle: Compliance capabilities enabled by on-premise deployment

items.title: Data Sovereignty
items.description: All data stays within your infrastructure. No external data transfers.

items.title: Complete Audit Logs
items.description: Full audit logging and report generation included as standard. Support for regulatory documentation.

items.title: Certification Support
items.description: Technical support for your SOC2/ISO27001 certification. Audit-ready documentation provided.

items.title: Financial Regulation Ready
items.description: Technical architecture support for financial regulations (MiCA, etc.).

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We assess your requirements and technical environment. Propose optimal deployment plan.

steps.title: Contract & KYB
steps.description: License agreement execution and Know Your Business verification.

steps.title: Environment Setup
steps.description: Component deployment to your infrastructure, configuration, and verification.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Production migration after testing completion. Ongoing maintenance support begins.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions from operators considering deployment

0.question: What is the license fee?
0.answer: Pricing is customized based on your scale and requirements. Contact us for detailed pricing during initial consultation.

1.question: What technical requirements are needed?
1.answer: Kubernetes or equivalent container environment, HSM (recommended), sufficient storage and network bandwidth. Detailed requirements available in technical documentation.

2.question: We're concerned about running it ourselves. Is support available?
2.answer: Technical support is included in the maintenance contract. We provide deployment assistance, troubleshooting after go-live, and regular health checks. 24/7 premium support also available.

3.question: Is customization possible?
3.answer: White-labeling the admin dashboard is included as standard. Other customizations available for additional fee. As code is provided, you can also customize on your side.

4.question: Do you provide documentation for regulators?
4.answer: Yes, we provide technical documentation on quantum-resistant cryptography, security audit reports, architecture diagrams, and other materials useful for regulatory explanations.

5.question: Can we integrate with existing systems?
5.answer: REST API and Webhooks are provided as standard. SDKs for major languages are also available. SSO integration and custom integrations are supported.

cta.title: Start Preparing for the Quantum Era
cta.description: Our dedicated team will assess your requirements and propose the optimal deployment plan. Feel free to start with a technical documentation request.

expertQuotes.title: Why Quantum Resistance Matters
expertQuotes.subtitle: Perspectives from cryptography experts

0.quote: Q-Day, when quantum computers break encryption, may come sooner than expected. Organizations need to start preparing now.
0.author: Dr. Michele Mosca
0.title: Institute for Quantum Computing, University of Waterloo

1.quote: NIST's post-quantum cryptography standardization has given the industry clear direction. Dilithium will become a primary choice for signature algorithms.
1.author: Dr. Dustin Moody
1.title: NIST PQC Project Lead

2.quote: Financial institutions should develop quantum-resistant cryptography transition plans immediately. Migration may take several years.
2.author: BIS (Bank for International Settlements)
2.title: Financial Stability Board Report

expertQuotes.disclaimer: * Quotes are references from respective sources. Deployment decisions should be made at your discretion.
